name: kamiyo
description: Solana escrow with dispute resolution for API payments. Also supports x402 HTTP 402 payments and Kamino Earn (KVault) AutoSave.

agent_private_key.title: Agent Private Key
agent_private_key.description: Base58 or JSON array private key for signing transactions

agent_keypair_path.title: Agent Keypair Path
agent_keypair_path.description: Path to a Solana JSON keypair (alternative to agent_private_key)

kamino_min_aum_usd.title: Kamino Min AUM USD
kamino_min_aum_usd.description: Default minimum AUM (USD) filter for vault suggestions

kamino_usdc_mint.title: USDC Mint
kamino_usdc_mint.description: Override the default USDC mint address

tools.name: create_escrow
tools.description: Create payment escrow with time lock and dispute capability

tools.name: check_escrow_status
tools.description: Check escrow account status and details

tools.name: verify_payment
tools.description: Verify payment received and escrow active

tools.name: estimate_refund
tools.description: Calculate refund based on quality score

tools.name: file_dispute
tools.description: File on-chain dispute for poor quality data

tools.name: get_api_reputation
tools.description: Get API provider reputation and history

tools.name: call_api_with_escrow
tools.description: Full flow: escrow, call, assess, auto-dispute

tools.name: x402_fetch
tools.description: Fetch from x402 endpoint with USDC payment

tools.name: kamino_list_vaults
tools.description: List Kamino Earn (KVault) vaults (defaults to USDC)

tools.name: kamino_vault_metrics
tools.description: Fetch Kamino Earn (KVault) vault metrics (APY, AUM)

tools.name: kamino_suggest_vaults
tools.description: Suggest top Kamino Earn vaults ranked by APY with AUM filter

tools.name: kamino_positions
tools.description: Fetch Kamino Earn positions for a wallet

tools.name: kamino_deposit
tools.description: Build or send a Kamino Earn vault deposit transaction (default dryRun=true)

tools.name: kamino_withdraw
tools.description: Build or send a Kamino Earn vault withdraw transaction (default dryRun=true)

tools.name: kamino_autosave_usdc
tools.description: AutoSave idle USDC into a suggested Kamino Earn vault (default dryRun=true)
